sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16761" key="a)sumbole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσυμ-βολέω</orth>, <sense id="n16761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pay no contribution towards,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.17</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
